kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'เปี่ยมสุขแมนชั่น' into text field 'xpath=(//input[contains(@placeholder,'พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่')])[1]'.
kw.arg: เปี่ยมสุขแมนชั่น
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ARROW_DOWN',) to xpath=(//input[contains(@placeholder,'พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่')])[1] element.
Pressing special key ARROW_DOWN to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ARROW_DOWN',) to xpath=(//input[contains(@placeholder,'พิมพ์ชื่อสถานที่')])[1] element.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Switch Browser
kw.doc: Switches between active browsers using ``index_or_alias``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="836e48a004a520f86f09bd3fdc48ae53", element="f.A0A915558FB7CF2367068E46E563586E.d.71CE14CC05B2E3377AFFF98632366EE6.e.136")>'
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="836e48a004a520f86f09bd3fdc48ae53", element="f.A0A915558FB7CF2367068E46E563586E.d.71CE14CC05B2E3377AFFF98632366EE6.e.160")>'
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="836e48a004a520f86f09bd3fdc48ae53", element="f.A0A915558FB7CF2367068E46E563586E.d.71CE14CC05B2E3377AFFF98632366EE6.e.161")>'
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].click(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="836e48a004a520f86f09bd3fdc48ae53", element="f.A0A915558FB7CF2367068E46E563586E.d.71CE14CC05B2E3377AFFF98632366EE6.e.136")>'
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ส่งข้อความ Broadcast เรียบร้อยแล้ว
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
